front: What are T-cell epitopes and how are they predicted?
back: T-cell epitopes are 8-25 amino acid peptides presented by MHC molecules. MHC-I presents intracellular peptides (8-10 aa) to CD8+ T cells. MHC-II presents extracellular peptides (13-25 aa) to CD4+ T cells. Prediction: NetMHCpan, IEDB consensus algorithms.
